mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EQP_DOWNTIME ( PLANT_CD, EQUIPMENT_CD, DOWNTIME_DT, DOWNTIME_TYPE, DOWNTIME_CD, DOWNTIME_REASON, START_DTM, END_DTM, DOWNTIME_MIN, WO_ID, OPER_ID, ACTION_CONTENT, ACTION_USER_ID, ACTION_DTM, REPORTER_ID, DOWNTIME_RMK, REG_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{request.plantCd}, #{request.equipmentCd}, #{request.downtimeDt}, #{request.downtimeType}, #{request.downtimeCd}, #{request.downtimeReason}, #{request.startDtm}, #{request.endDtm}, #{request.downtimeMin}, #{request.woId}, #{request.operId}, #{request.actionContent}, #{request.actionUserId}, #{request.actionDtm}, #{request.reporterId}, #{request.downtimeRmk}, #{request.regUserId} )

INSERT INTO EQP_MAINT_HIS ( PLANT_CD, EQUIPMENT_CD, MAINT_NO, MAINT_TYPE, MAINT_DT, MAINT_PLAN_ID, DOWNTIME_ID, START_DTM, END_DTM, MAINT_TIME, MAINT_WORKER_ID, MAINT_TEAM, MAINT_CONTENT, SYMPTOM, CAUSE, ACTION, PART_REPLACED, PART_COST, LABOR_COST, OTHER_COST, MAINT_RESULT, NEXT_MAINT_DT, MAINT_RMK, REG_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{request.plantCd}, #{request.equipmentCd}, #{maintNo}, #{request.maintType}, #{request.maintDt}, #{request.maintPlanId}, #{request.downtimeId}, #{request.startDtm}, #{request.endDtm}, #{request.maintTime}, #{request.maintWorkerId}, #{request.maintTeam}, #{request.maintContent}, #{request.symptom}, #{request.cause}, #{request.action}, #{request.partReplaced}, #{request.partCost}, #{request.laborCost}, #{request.otherCost}, #{request.maintResult}, #{request.nextMaintDt}, #{request.maintRmk}, #{request.regUserId} )
